reviews.review_description: Please add more games

Love the variety! Minigolf is absolutely wonderful, though the others are great too. And the epic detail inside the backpack is not needed but SO COOL. About that, I've won the crown accessory twice on the wheel, but I can't equip it? What's up with it not showing in the backpack at all? Also, a bowling game could really work here! Looking forward to more updates :)

I just noticed a little bug since few weeks ago, now when you push the back button, the backpack won't come up but oculus home does, I don't know if it is just me or everyone but I hope you guys help me fix this, it's a pretty good game and my girlfriend lives it!

The Til Game with the Cow not work in down Direction. Left/ Right/ Up Controller with Oculus Go works perfect, nur Down Controller didnt work, so i cant win the Race! Pls repair/ fix this and i will give 5* for this Masterpice.

The game is cool kids love it and it has some really good replay ability to try beat your high score and if you have Bait on your oculus Go you'll see a few fun easter eggs along the way.You also don't start with everything wich means you have to unlock stuff which makes it even funner since your not overwelmed with choices and some fun gimicky multiplayer to try beat your friends high score

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for taking the time to review the game! It's great to hear that you and your kids are enjoying the game and finding it to be fun and engaging. The feature of unlocking items and not starting with everything is an interesting game mechanic and we're glad that you find it to be a fun challenge. It's also good to hear that you've found some fun Easter eggs along the way! We appreciate your feedback and hope you continue to enjoy the game.

reviews.review_description: Impressive visuals and fun gameplay makes this a magical experience.
Everyone in the family enjoys playing this...  such s great little virtual world to play different games in.  Thank you, devs! Please add more games!
A bit boring for adults
It’s a very fun game I just wish there were more games besides the few that’s there

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We'll keep this in mind for the future. :)

reviews.review_description: This game is cute and the games are endlessly fun. The games are ingenious ideas in concept and the design. This game is also not behind multiple paywalls. There is only one for one minigame and it's not expensive. The game you get for it is the most fun one. Best of all, this game has two player that doesn't require 2 headsets and phones. I love this game.
Fun but the little kid that tells you what to do is dumb I think after the first two games we should pick what we want. Also maybe add a character customization liks thrillville

Wonderful game. Only issue is tindertown after wave 25. The game stops and you are trapped. If you quit, you lose all your tickets. Can you please test and resolve the issue? Otherwise, easily a 5 star game on Oculus go

Super love this. At first I thought it was just another app I would get to play one little game out of it they want me to buy the rest but no it was very lengthy and very very wonderful for a free game I must’ve played it for like an hour really great super immersive and I loved it please make more of these
I love this game because it has such a variety of things to do.  Sometimes I get tired of killing zombies and this is a great alternative.

Great app to show off vr to new people. 
Not enough replayability to play it regularly. 
It really just makes you wanna buy a fully featured minil-golf game.

It’s a very fun game to play and for 3 dollars, I think the extra 3 games were worth it. Predictably, I’d like to see another minigame added to it but that would just be a bonus! Great job:) would recommend!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! <3

reviews.review_title: Great introduction to the Oculus Go
reviews.review_description: As the title says I found this game to be an excellent way to get started with my Oculus Go. The different  minigames really get you used to using the OG controller. All the games are fun, my favorites are Tiny Tee Golf and Magic Mayhem, and my wife particularly enjoys Hamster Hoops. I bought the unlock as, among other things, you get another 9 holes for TTG. Also appreciated is the fact that this game is optimised for the Oculus Go, and makes good use of it, whereas some other games and apps seem to be lazy ports from other platforms.
Fun game but definitely would want to play vs other people

This is a great app to start off with. It's geared towards kids but it's a lot of fun for everyone. It's a carnival with mini games like mini golf, basketball, a fruit ninja type game, putting out fires, and more. Add online multiplayer and I'll give it 5 Stars.

reviews.review_title: Carnival Games not rides is good!
reviews.review_description: The mini golf and basketball are my favs, the basketball is a tad too sensitive tho.  So interesting that the 3rd mini golf course is harder and longer than in the Daydream version too!  Maybe make a demo of new games that come along so we can gladly buy with confidence.
